query:
UPDATE orders 
SET partnerFee = ROUND((CAST(courseAmount AS DECIMAL(10,2)) - CAST(teacherFee AS DECIMAL(10,2))) * 0.30, 2)
WHERE deliveryCity = '泉州' 
  AND courseAmount IS NOT NULL 
  AND courseAmount != '0.00'
  AND teacherFee IS NOT NULL;
command:

  AND courseAmount != '0.00'
  AND teacherFee IS NOT NULL;
